innovation_1.name: 双掩码物理建模与类MRI角度频率分析框架
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that extracting intrinsic physical and angular frequency characteristics is crucial for establishing a robust foundation for dual-modality energy map optimization.

innovation_2.name: 基于GCD与SAM引导的自适应双模态能量图优化策略
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a comprehensive pipeline featuring GCD and SAM-guided adaptive energy map optimization, seamlessly integrated with an omni-directional cost volume and multi-scale uncertainty-aware network.

innovation_3.name: 全视角代价卷与多尺度不确定性感知网络
innovation_3.contribution_statement: We demonstrate that coupling physical-frequency analysis with advanced uncertainty-aware deep architectures significantly enhances the accuracy, robustness, and reliability of the overall predictive framework.
